viz.area_data_desc: Changes in total values, emphasizing volume over time.
viz.axis_labeling_desc: Always clearly label units and axes.
viz.bar_data_desc: Categorical data, rankings, comparing differences between items.
viz.color_minimal_desc: Minimize colors; focus on differentiating items via PCCS palette.
viz.funnel_data_desc: Process reduction stages, conversion rate visualization.
viz.gauge_data_desc: Current position relative to a single target, achievement level.
viz.heatmap_data_desc: Multivariable matrix density, behavior pattern visualization.
viz.legend_pos_desc: Adjust legend placement so they don't crowd the chart.
viz.line_data_desc: Time series, continuous changes, trend analysis.
viz.multi_series_total_trend: Trends in totals for multiple series
viz.not_only_color_desc: Don't rely on color alone; use tooltips and labels for clarity.
viz.pie_data_desc: Composition ratios, market share, part of the total.
viz.scatter_data_desc: Correlation between 2 variables, outlier detection, distribution checks.
viz.selection_criteria_desc: Select the ideal chart for the story you want to tell and the nature of your data.
viz.treemap_data_desc: Hierarchical data relations, contribution to the whole.

guide.visualization_desc: Guidelines for choosing the right chart or graph component based on the type of data and the story you want to tell.
